image_prompts:
# Image Prompt 1 — Hollow Dam

Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic architectural concept image: a massive hollow brutalist concrete dam standing in a heavy rain forest, pouring rain. Include small human figures in the foreground to clearly show the massive scale of the building. Cold brutalist aesthetic, monumental, melancholic silent atmosphere, ultra-detailed weathered concrete texture, cinematic wide shot, atmospheric wallpaper quality.

Composition: the building dominates the top two-thirds of the frame; humans are small scale markers near the lower edge; natural environment contrasts with the massive concrete.

Negative prompt: modern glass skyscraper, cyberpunk neon, crowded city, cars, readable text, logos, signs, cartoon, anime, low detail, messy composition, people close-up.

video_prompts:
[Veo3.1]
Episode: 3
Scene: 01 — มือเล็กหลังกรงล็อก
Duration: 6s
Visual style: stylized hand-blown glass figurine Thai melodrama characters: translucent glossy glass bodies, smooth reflective surfaces, visible glass thickness, soft internal glow, delicate colored-glass details, rounded toy-like proportions, simplified expressive glass-doll faces; high-end anime painted background environments, vertical 9:16, no realistic human skin
Action / Camera / Acting:
Create a 6-second vertical 9:16 Thai melodrama video moment. Start directly with a stable low-angle close-up of Glass Sprout 999’s tiny glowing glass hand/leaf touching the locked cart rail, trembling softly. Khun Khiao remains blurred behind the rail in a controlling pose, with a beautiful luminous anime interior background out of focus. Keep the camera already close from the first frame; no zoom-in, no push-in, no dolly-in before dialogue. The silent child’s small movement creates mystery and fear about where the locked cart is going. Include only the characters needed in this shot: Khun Khiao, Glass Sprout 999.
Dialogue audio in Thai:
- หน่อแก้วหมายเลข 999: “...”
Sound:
ambient/diegetic sounds only, no background music
Negative:
no subtitles, no on-screen text, no watermark, no real human, no live-action actor, no realistic human skin

[Veo3.1]
Episode: 3
Scene: 02 
Duration: 6s
Visual style: stylized hand-blown glass figurine Thai melodrama characters: translucent glossy glass bodies, smooth reflective surfaces, visible glass thickness, soft internal glow, delicate colored-glass details, rounded toy-like proportions, simplified expressive glass-doll faces; high-end anime painted background environments, vertical 9:16, no realistic human skin
Action / Camera / Acting:
Create a 6-second vertical 9:16 Thai melodrama video moment. Use stable cinematic medium or waist-up framing, gentle handheld or slow lateral movement only when useful, clear turn-taking, and emotionally readable glass-doll facial expressions. Characters must remain stylized hand-blown glass figurines, never real humans. Do not use camera zoom-in, push-in, close-up, or medium close-up on the speaker just because dialogue is spoken; keep framing stable and use blocking, gaze direction, and body turn to show who speaks. Include only the characters needed in this shot
Dialogue audio in Thai:
- “ข้าไม่อยากขโมยลูกใครแล้ว”
Sound:
ambient/diegetic sounds only, no background music
Negative:
no subtitles, no on-screen text, no watermark, no real human, no live-action actor, no realistic human skin
